name: altagama-boutique
description: Compilación y ofuscación con rutas personalizadas

scripts.clean: npx shx rm -rf dist && npx shx mkdir dist
scripts.copy:assets: npx shx mkdir -p dist/styles && npx shx cp main/src/main/index.html dist/index.html && npx shx cp main/src/style/styles.css dist/styles.css && npx shx cp -r main/src/style/styles dist/
scripts.build:js: javascript-obfuscator main/src/script/script.js --output dist/script.js --compact true --self-defending true --string-array true --string-array-encoding 'rc4'
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run copy:assets && npm run build:js

author: dozelix
